step_rationale: Angiogenic growth factor mediating vascular repair post-MI; off atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: bFGF promotes angiogenesis and vascular remodeling during myocardial recovery but does not drive atherothrombotic events.

references.title: Targeted delivery of engineered adipose-derived stem cell secretome to promote cardiac repair after myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Journal of controlled release : official journal of the Controlled Release Society

references.title: Hypoxia-inducible factor 1-alpha enhances the secretome to rejuvenate adult cardiosphere-derived cells.
references.journal: The Journal of thoracic and cardiovascular surgery

references.title: Endothelium-specific CYP2J2 overexpression improves cardiac dysfunction by promoting angiogenesis via Jagged1/Notch1 signaling.
